member.name: T:ASL.AslBoard
member.summary: Represents a map board in the ASL system.

member.name: P:ASL.AslBoard.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name/identifier of the map (e.g., "1", "4", "62").

member.name: P:ASL.AslBoard.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of this map.

member.name: P:ASL.AslBoard.IsFirstColShiftedDown
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the first column (A) is shifted down relative to the second (B).

member.name: P:ASL.AslBoard.Width
member.summary: Gets or sets the hex width of the map.

member.name: P:ASL.AslBoard.Height
member.summary: Gets or sets the hex height of the map.

member.name: P:ASL.AslBoard.CanvasWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of the canvas in pixels.

member.name: P:ASL.AslBoard.CanvasHeight
member.summary: Gets or sets the height of the canvas in pixels.

member.name: P:ASL.AslBoard.Board
member.summary: Gets or sets the underlying HexLib board.

member.name: M:ASL.AslBoard.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:ASL.AslBoard.GetAslCoordinate(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates an ASL coordinate string (e.g., "A1", "AA10") from column and row indices.
member.param: 0-based column index.
0-based row index.

member.name: M:ASL.AslBoard.PopulateBoard
member.summary: Populates the underlying HexLib board with hexes based on current Width and Height.

member.name: M:ASL.AslBoard.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a name.
member.param: The name of the board.

member.name: T:ASL.ASLDateParser
member.summary: Provides utility methods for parsing ASL-specific date strings.

member.name: M:ASL.ASLDateParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to parse a date string like "September 2nd, 1941" or "Oct 3, 1942". Removes ordinal suffixes (st, nd, rd, th) before parsing.

member.name: T:ASL.ASLDice
member.summary: Service responsible for ASL dice rolling mechanics.

member.name: E:ASL.ASLDice.OnDiceRolled
member.summary: Occurs whenever a dice roll is performed. UI components can subscribe to this to show animations or results.

member.name: M:ASL.ASLDice.DR
member.summary: Performs a 2d6 roll (one colored, one white).

member.name: M:ASL.ASLDice.dr
member.summary: Performs a single 1d6 roll (result is in WhiteDie).

member.name: T:ASL.ASLEdgeData
member.summary: Represents data on a hexside in ASL (Walls, Hedges, Roads, etc.).

member.name: P:ASL.ASLEdgeData.HasWall
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether there is a wall on this hexside.

member.name: P:ASL.ASLEdgeData.HasHedge
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether there is a hedge on this hexside.

member.name: P:ASL.ASLEdgeData.HasBocage
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether there is bocage on this hexside.

member.name: P:ASL.ASLEdgeData.HasRoad
member.summary: If true, a road follows this hexside (connecting two hexes).

member.name: T:ASL.ASLHexMetadata
member.summary: Metadata for ASL-specific hexes, including terrain and elevation.

member.name: P:ASL.ASLHexMetadata.Terrain
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of terrain in this hex.

member.name: P:ASL.ASLHexMetadata.Elevation
member.summary: Gets or sets the elevation level of the hex (0=ground level).

member.name: P:ASL.ASLHexMetadata.HasSewer
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this hex contains a sewer connection.

member.name: T:ASL.AslModule
member.summary: Represents a physical ASL game module and its properties.

member.name: P:ASL.AslModule.FrontImage
member.summary: Gets or sets the file path to the front image of the module box.

member.name: P:ASL.AslModule.BackImage
member.summary: Gets or sets the file path to the back image of the module box.

member.name: P:ASL.AslModule.Module
member.summary: Gets or sets the specific module identity.

member.name: P:ASL.AslModule.FullName
member.summary: Gets or sets the full display name of the module.

member.name: P:ASL.AslModule.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets a description of the module contents.

member.name: P:ASL.AslModule.RequiredModules
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of other modules required to use this module.

member.name: P:ASL.AslModule.IsFinished
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether all data for this module has been fully implemented.

member.name: M:ASL.AslModule.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:ASL.AslModule.#ctor(ASL.Module,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with basic info.
member.param: The module identity.
Grand full name.
Module overview.

member.name: T:ASL.ASLProject
member.summary: Bundles ASL data (Counters, Scenarios) together for project-level persistence.

member.name: P:ASL.ASLProject.Counters
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of counters in the project.

member.name: P:ASL.ASLProject.Scenarios
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of scenarios in the project.

member.name: P:ASL.ASLProject.Modules
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of game modules in the project.

member.name: P:ASL.ASLProject.Boards
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of map boards in the project.

member.name: T:ASL.DiceRollResult
member.summary: Holds the result of an ASL dice roll, distinguishing between 1d6 (dr) and 2d6 (DR). In a DR, the colored die and white die are tracked separately for mechanics like Snakes, Boxcars, and Sniper Activation.

member.name: P:ASL.DiceRollResult.Total
member.summary: The combined total of the dice rolled.

member.name: P:ASL.DiceRollResult.WhiteDie
member.summary: The value of the white die (the only die in a dr, or the first die in a DR).

member.name: P:ASL.DiceRollResult.ColoredDie
member.summary: The value of the colored die (the second die in a DR, or 0 in a dr).

member.name: P:ASL.DiceRollResult.DiceCount
member.summary: How many dice were rolled (1 or 2).

member.name: M:ASL.DiceRollResult.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The result of the white die.
The result of the colored die (if 2d6).
The number of dice rolled (1 or 2).

member.name: M:ASL.DiceRollResult.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the dice roll result.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.Components.BPVComponent
member.summary: Component that defines the Basic Point Value (BPV) of a unit.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.BPVComponent.Owner
member.summary: Gets the unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.BPVComponent.ComponentName
member.summary: Gets the name of the component.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Components.BPVComponent.Initialize(ASL.Models.Unit)
member.summary: Initializes the component with its owner unit.
member.param: The unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.BPVComponent.BPV
member.summary: Gets or sets the Basic Point Value.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.Components.BreakdownComponent
member.summary: Component that defines the breakdown and removal numbers of a support weapon.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.BreakdownComponent.Owner
member.summary: Gets the unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.BreakdownComponent.ComponentName
member.summary: Gets the name of the component.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Components.BreakdownComponent.Initialize(ASL.Models.Unit)
member.summary: Initializes the component with its owner unit.
member.param: The unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.BreakdownComponent.BreakdownNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the number at which the weapon breaks down.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.BreakdownComponent.RemovalNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the number at which the weapon is removed from play (permanent breakdown).

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.BreakdownComponent.RepairNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the number required to repair the weapon.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.Components.FirePowerComponent
member.summary: Component that defines the firepower and range of a unit.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.FirePowerComponent.Owner
member.summary: Gets the unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.FirePowerComponent.ComponentName
member.summary: Gets the name of the component.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Components.FirePowerComponent.Initialize(ASL.Models.Unit)
member.summary: Initializes the component with its owner unit.
member.param: The unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.FirePowerComponent.Firepower
member.summary: Gets or sets the base firepower value.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.FirePowerComponent.Range
member.summary: Gets or sets the base range value (in hexes).

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.FirePowerComponent.RateOfFire
member.summary: Gets or sets the rate of fire (ROF).

member.name: T:ASL.Models.Components.HeroComponent
member.summary: Component that marks a unit as a Hero.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.HeroComponent.Owner
member.summary: Gets the unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.HeroComponent.ComponentName
member.summary: Gets the name of the component.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Components.HeroComponent.Initialize(ASL.Models.Unit)
member.summary: Initializes the component with its owner unit.
member.param: The unit that owns this component.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.Components.InfantryComponent
member.summary: Component that defines basic infantry statistics and capabilities.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.InfantryComponent.HasAssaultFire
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the unit has Assault Fire capability.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.InfantryComponent.HasSprayingFire
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the unit has Spraying Fire capability.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.InfantryComponent.CanSelfRally
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the unit can Self Rally.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.InfantryComponent.HasELR
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the unit has ELR (Experience Level Rating) capability.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.InfantryComponent.Scale
member.summary: Gets or sets the scale of the infantry unit (Squad, Half-Squad, Crew, SMC).

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.InfantryComponent.Morale
member.summary: Gets or sets the unit's morale value.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.InfantryComponent.BrokenMorale
member.summary: Gets or sets the unit's broken morale value, or null for units that don't have one (e.g., Japanese leaders).

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.InfantryComponent.AslClass
member.summary: Gets or sets the ASL class of the unit (Elite, First Line, etc.).

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.InfantryComponent.Owner
member.summary: gets the unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.InfantryComponent.ComponentName
member.summary: Gets the name of the component.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Components.InfantryComponent.Initialize(ASL.Models.Unit)
member.summary: Initializes the component with its owner unit.
member.param: The unit that owns this component.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.Components.IUnitComponent
member.summary: Interface for all unit components. Components define specific capabilities and statistics for a Unit.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.IUnitComponent.Owner
member.summary: Gets or sets the Unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.IUnitComponent.ComponentName
member.summary: Gets the unique name or type identifier for the component.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Components.IUnitComponent.Initialize(ASL.Models.Unit)
member.summary: Initializes the component with its owner unit.
member.param: The unit that owns this component.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.Components.LeadershipComponent
member.summary: Component that defines the leadership bonus of a unit.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.LeadershipComponent.Owner
member.summary: Gets the unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.LeadershipComponent.ComponentName
member.summary: Gets the name of the component.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Components.LeadershipComponent.Initialize(ASL.Models.Unit)
member.summary: Initializes the component with its owner unit.
member.param: The unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.LeadershipComponent.Leadership
member.summary: Gets or sets the leadership modifier (e.g., -1, 0, 1).

member.name: T:ASL.Models.Components.MachineGunComponent
member.summary: Component that defines the specific type of machine gun.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.MachineGunComponent.Owner
member.summary: Gets the unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.MachineGunComponent.ComponentName
member.summary: Gets the name of the component.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Components.MachineGunComponent.Initialize(ASL.Models.Unit)
member.summary: Initializes the component with its owner unit.
member.param: The unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.MachineGunComponent.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of the machine gun.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.MachineGunComponent.HasSprayingFire
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the machine gun has spraying fire capability.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.OrdnanceComponent.Owner
member.summary: Gets the unit that owns this component.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.Components.PortageComponent
member.summary: Component that defines the portage (weight) and dismantle status of a unit.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.PortageComponent.Owner
member.summary: Gets the unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.PortageComponent.ComponentName
member.summary: Gets the name of the component.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Components.PortageComponent.Initialize(ASL.Models.Unit)
member.summary: Initializes the component with its owner unit.
member.param: The unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.PortageComponent.AssembledCost
member.summary: Gets or sets the portage cost (weight) of the unit when assembled.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.PortageComponent.DismantledCost
member.summary: Gets or sets the portage cost (weight) of the unit when dismantled, if applicable.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.PortageComponent.IsDismantled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the unit is currently dismantled.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.PortageComponent.DismantledImage
member.summary: Gets or sets the file path to the image representing the unit when dismantled.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.PortageComponent.CanBeDismantled
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the unit can be dismantled.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Components.PortageComponent.Dismantle
member.summary: Dismantles the unit if it is capable of being dismantled.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Components.PortageComponent.Assemble
member.summary: Assembles the unit.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.Components.RadioComponent
member.summary: Component that represents a Radio with a specific contact number.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.RadioComponent.Owner
member.summary: Gets the unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.RadioComponent.ComponentName
member.summary: Gets the name of the component.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Components.RadioComponent.Initialize(ASL.Models.Unit)
member.summary: Initializes the component with its owner unit.
member.param: The unit that owns this component.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.RadioComponent.ContactNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the contact number required for the radio.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.RadioComponent.BatteryId
member.summary: Gets or sets the battery ID to the OBA (Off Board Artillery).

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.RadioComponent.HasContact
member.summary: If the contact roll has succeded and the unit has contact with the OBA (Off Board Artillery).

member.name: T:ASL.Models.Components.SmokeProviderComponent
member.summary: Component that provides smoke placement capabilities.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.SmokeProviderComponent.CapabilityNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the "Exponent" (for Infantry/SW) or "Depletion Number" (for Ordnance/Vehicles).

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Components.SmokeProviderComponent.SmokeType
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of smoke provided.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.InfantryScale
member.summary: Specifies the scale of an infantry unit.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.InfantryScale.Squad
member.summary: Full squad.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.InfantryScale.HalfSquad
member.summary: Half-squad.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.InfantryScale.Crew
member.summary: Gun or weapon crew.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.InfantryScale.SMC
member.summary: Single-man counter (Leader or Hero).

member.name: T:ASL.Models.MachineGunType
member.summary: Specifies the type of machine gun.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.MachineGunType.LMG
member.summary: Light machine gun.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.MachineGunType.MMG
member.summary: Medium machine gun.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.MachineGunType.HMG
member.summary: Heavy machine gun.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.Maps.MapType
member.summary: Specifies the geometric or logical type of an ASL map.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.Maps.MapType.Standard
member.summary: A standard 10x33 hex board (e.g., Board 1).

member.name: F:ASL.Models.Maps.MapType.NonStandard
member.summary: A board with non-standard dimensions or half-hex configurations.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.Maps.MapType.StandAlone
member.summary: A standalone map (e.g., Red Barricades, Deluxe boards).

member.name: T:ASL.Models.Nationality
member.summary: Specifies the nationality of an ASL unit or scenario side.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.Nationality.German
member.summary: German nationality.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.Nationality.Russian
member.summary: Russian / Soviet nationality.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.Nationality.Finnish
member.summary: Finnish nationality.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.Nationality.Partisan
member.summary: Partisan / Resistance forces.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.Nationality.American
member.summary: American nationality.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.Nationality.Japanese
member.summary: Japanese nationality.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.Player
member.summary: Represents a participant in an ASL game.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Player.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the player's name.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Player.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the player.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Player.ScenarioSide
member.summary: Gets or sets the scenario side for the player. Null means that no side has been picked for this player.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.ScenarioSide
member.summary: Represents a side in an ASL scenario, including nationality and role.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.ScenarioSide.Nationality
member.summary: Gets or sets the nationality for this side.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.ScenarioSide.Side
member.summary: Gets or sets the tactical side (Attacker or Defender).

member.name: P:ASL.Models.ScenarioSide.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name or designation of the forces (e.g., "The 10th Guards").

member.name: T:ASL.Models.Side
member.summary: Represents the side of a unit in a scenario and it determines who sets up first and who moves first.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.Side.Attacker
member.summary: The attacker is the side that sets up second and moves first.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.Side.Defender
member.summary: The defender is the side that sets up first and moves second.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.SmokeDeliveryMethod
member.summary: Represents the method by which smoke is delivered.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.SmokeDeliveryMethod.Placement_dr
member.summary: Smoke is placed by an infantry unit.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.SmokeDeliveryMethod.Ordnance_DR
member.summary: Smoke is delivered by ordnance.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.SmokeDeliveryMethod.Dispenser_DR
member.summary: Smoke is delivered by a dispenser.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.SmokeType
member.summary: Represents the type of smoke.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.SmokeType.White
member.summary: White smoke.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.SmokeType.WP
member.summary: White Phosphorus smoke.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.SmokeType.Candles
member.summary: Candle smoke.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.SmokeType.SmokeDischarger
member.summary: Smoke Discharger smoke.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.Unit
member.summary: Represents a basic unit in the ASL system, which can be composed of multiple components. Implements ICounter for hex-based positioning.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier for the unit, currently defaulting to its Name.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the unit.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.ImagePathFront
member.summary: Gets or sets the file path to the front image of the unit's counter.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.ImagePathBack
member.summary: Gets or sets the file path to the back image of the unit's counter.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.UnitType
member.summary: Gets or sets the general unit type (SMC, MMC, etc.).

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.Nationality
member.summary: Gets or sets the nationality of the unit.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.Parent
member.summary: Gets or sets the parent unit (e.g., if this is a support weapon carried by a squad).

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.Components
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of components that define the unit's capabilities.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Unit.GetComponent``1
member.summary: Retrieves a component of the specified type, if it exists.
member.typeparam: The type of component to retrieve.
member.returns: The component instance, or null if not found.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Unit.HasComponent``1
member.summary: Checks if the unit has a component of the specified type.
member.typeparam: The type of component to check for.
member.returns: True if the component exists; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Unit.AddComponent``1(``0)
member.summary: Adds a component to the unit and initializes it.
member.typeparam: The type of component to add.
member.param: The component instance to add.
member.exception: Thrown if a component of the same type already exists.

member.name: M:ASL.Models.Unit.RemoveComponent``1(``0)
member.summary: Removes a specific component from the unit.
member.typeparam: The type of component to remove.
member.param: The component instance to remove.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.IsLeader
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this unit represents a Leader (SMC with Leadership and Infantry components).

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.IsHero
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this unit represents a Hero (SMC with Hero and Infantry components).

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.IsHalfSquad
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this unit represents a Half-Squad.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.IsCrew
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this unit represents a Crew.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.IsSquad
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this unit represents a full Squad.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.IsSupportWeapon
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this unit represents a Support Weapon.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.Infantry
member.summary: Gets the InfantryComponent of the unit, if present.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.Leadership
member.summary: Gets the LeadershipComponent of the unit, if present.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.Hero
member.summary: Gets the HeroComponent of the unit, if present.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.FirePower
member.summary: Gets the FirePowerComponent of the unit, if present.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.Bpv
member.summary: Gets the BPVComponent of the unit, if present.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.Portage
member.summary: Gets the PortageComponent of the unit, if present.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.Breakdown
member.summary: Gets the BreakdownComponent of the unit, if present.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.MachineGun
member.summary: Gets the MachineGunComponent of the unit, if present.

member.name: P:ASL.Models.Unit.RateOfFire
member.summary: Gets the Rate of Fire of the unit, if present.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.UnitClass
member.summary: Specifies the quality or experience class of an ASL MMC or SMC.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.UnitClass.Elite
member.summary: High-quality elite units.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.UnitClass.FirstLine
member.summary: Standard front-line combat units.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.UnitClass.SecondLine
member.summary: Intermediate or reserve units.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.UnitClass.Green
member.summary: Inexperienced or new units.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.UnitClass.Conscript
member.summary: Low-quality draft units.

member.name: T:ASL.Models.UnitType
member.summary: Specifies the general type of unit.

member.name: F:ASL.Models.UnitType.SMC
member.summary: Single-Man Counter (Leaders, Heroes).

member.name: F:ASL.Models.UnitType.MMC
member.summary: Multi-Man Counter (Squads, Half-Squads, Crews).

member.name: F:ASL.Models.UnitType.Vehicle
member.summary: Vehicles (Tanks, Trucks, etc.).

member.name: F:ASL.Models.UnitType.Ordnance
member.summary: Ordnance (Guns, Mortars, etc.).

member.name: F:ASL.Models.UnitType.Mountable
member.summary: Mountable units (Horses, etc.).

member.name: T:ASL.Module
member.summary: Represents the physical modules/boxes in the ASL system.

member.name: F:ASL.Module.Paratrooper
member.summary: The "Paratrooper" module.

member.name: F:ASL.Module.BeyondValor
member.summary: The "Beyond Valor" module (German/Russian).

member.name: F:ASL.Module.Yanks
member.summary: The "Yanks" module (American).

member.name: T:ASL.MovementCalculator
member.summary: Provides utility methods for calculating movement costs in an ASL game.

member.name: M:ASL.MovementCalculator.CalculateCost(HexLib.Hex{ASL.ASLHexMetadata},HexLib.Hex{ASL.ASLHexMetadata},ASL.ASLEdgeData)
member.summary: Calculates the cost to move from hex 'from' to hex 'to'. Accounts for road bonuses if both hexes and the connecting edge have roads. Accounts for wall/hedge penalties if the edge has them.

member.name: T:ASL.Persistence.ASLSaveManager
member.summary: Orchestrates saving and loading of ASL-specific data using a storage adapter.

member.name: M:ASL.Persistence.ASLSaveManager.#ctor(HexLib.Persistence.IStorageAdapter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The storage adapter to use for persistence.

member.name: M:ASL.Persistence.ASLSaveManager.SaveCountersAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{ASL.Models.Unit})
member.summary: Saves a collection of counters to storage.
member.param: The name/key for the counter collection.
The counters to save.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous save operation.

member.name: M:ASL.Persistence.ASLSaveManager.LoadCountersAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a collection of counters from storage.
member.param: The name/key of the counter collection to load.

member.name: M:ASL.Persistence.ASLSaveManager.ListCountersAsync
member.summary: Lists all available counter collection keys in storage.

member.name: M:ASL.Persistence.ASLSaveManager.PrepareProjectForSaving(ASL.ASLProject,System.String)
member.summary: Prepares a project for saving by copying all referenced images to a local "images" directory and updating the project's image paths to be relative.
member.param: The project containing absolute file paths.
The absolute path to the .asl project file.
member.returns: A copy of the project with relative image paths.

member.name: M:ASL.Persistence.ASLSaveManager.SerializeProject(ASL.ASLProject)
member.summary: Serializes an ASL project to a JSON string.
member.param: The project to serialize.

member.name: M:ASL.Persistence.ASLSaveManager.DeserializeProject(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes an ASL project from a JSON string.
member.param: The JSON string.
member.returns: The deserialized ASL project, or null if deserialization failed.

member.name: M:ASL.Persistence.ASLSaveManager.SaveScenarioAsync(ASL.Scenario)
member.summary: Saves a single scenario to storage.
member.param: The scenario to save.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous save operation.

member.name: M:ASL.Persistence.ASLSaveManager.LoadScenarioAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a single scenario from storage.
member.param: The name/key of the scenario.
member.returns: The loaded scenario, or null if not found.

member.name: M:ASL.Persistence.ASLSaveManager.ListScenariosAsync
member.summary: Lists all available scenario keys in storage.

member.name: M:ASL.Persistence.ASLSaveManager.SaveBoardAsync(System.String,HexLib.Board{ASL.ASLHexMetadata,ASL.ASLEdgeData})
member.summary: Saves an ASL board/map to storage.
member.param: The name/key for the board.
The board object to save.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous save operation.

member.name: M:ASL.Persistence.ASLSaveManager.LoadBoardAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Loads an ASL board/map from storage.
member.param: The name/key of the board.
member.returns: The loaded board, or null if not found.

member.name: M:ASL.Persistence.ASLSaveManager.ListMapsAsync
member.summary: Lists all available map/board keys in storage.

member.name: T:ASL.Scenario
member.summary: Represents an ASL Scenario, defining the starting state and context of a game.

member.name: P:ASL.Scenario.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the formal name of the scenario.

member.name: P:ASL.Scenario.Reference
member.summary: Gets or sets the scenario reference code (e.g., "ASL SCENARIO 1").

member.name: P:ASL.Scenario.ImagePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the file path to the image representing this scenario.

member.name: P:ASL.Scenario.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the historical background and context of the scenario.

member.name: P:ASL.Scenario.Module
member.summary: Gets or sets the physical module this scenario belongs to.

member.name: P:ASL.Scenario.ScenarioSides
member.summary: Gets or sets the scenario sides for the scenario. Must at least contain an attacker and a defender.

member.name: P:ASL.Scenario.AttackerSide
member.summary: Gets the side designated as the Attacker.

member.name: P:ASL.Scenario.DefenderSide
member.summary: Gets the side designated as the Defender.

member.name: P:ASL.Scenario.Turns
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of turns for the scenario.

member.name: P:ASL.Scenario.HasHalfTurn
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the final turn is a half-turn (only the first player acts).

member.name: P:ASL.Scenario.MagneticNorth
member.summary: Defines which physical direction on the global map represents Magnetic North for ASL rules (Wind, Drift, Random Direction, etc).

member.name: T:ASL.ScenarioDescription
member.summary: Contains the historical context of a scenario, divided into location, date, and description.

member.name: P:ASL.ScenarioDescription.Place
member.summary: Gets or sets the geographical location where the scenario takes place.

member.name: P:ASL.ScenarioDescription.Date
member.summary: Gets or sets the textual representation of the date (e.g., "May 1940").

member.name: P:ASL.ScenarioDescription.PreciseDate
member.summary: Gets or sets a specific for rules processing if applicable.

member.name: P:ASL.ScenarioDescription.DescriptionText
member.summary: Gets or sets the detailed historical narrative of the events.

member.name: P:ASL.ScenarioDescription.Aftermath
member.summary: Gets or sets the textual description of the historical outcome/aftermath.

member.name: M:ASL.ScenarioDescription.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:ASL.ScenarioDescription.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with specified values.

member.name: T:ASL.TerrainType
member.summary: Specifies the type of terrain in a hex.

member.name: F:ASL.TerrainType.OpenGround
member.summary: Clear terrain with no modifiers.

member.name: F:ASL.TerrainType.Woods
member.summary: Densely wooded area.

member.name: F:ASL.TerrainType.Orchard
member.summary: Area with scattered trees.

member.name: F:ASL.TerrainType.Grain
member.summary: Agricultural crops.

member.name: F:ASL.TerrainType.Brush
member.summary: Low, scrubby vegetation.

member.name: F:ASL.TerrainType.Building
member.summary: A generic building.

member.name: F:ASL.TerrainType.StoneBuilding
member.summary: A sturdy stone structure.

member.name: F:ASL.TerrainType.WoodenBuilding
member.summary: A lighter wooden structure.

member.name: F:ASL.TerrainType.Road
member.summary: A primary or secondary road.

member.name: F:ASL.TerrainType.Water
member.summary: A body of water.

member.name: F:ASL.TerrainType.Marsh
member.summary: A swampy or marshy area.
